description: Create a calendar event in Odoo named 'System Architecture Review' for Friday, March 13, 2026, starting at 9:00 AM. The event duration must be calculated to cover the following agenda items: Introduction & Objectives (15 min), Microservices Design Patterns (40 min), Database Sharding Strategy (35 min), and Action Items & Assignments (30 min). Set the location to 'Engineering Lab' and add 'David Chen' and 'Emma Thompson' as attendees. Include the agenda items in the meeting description. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin' if prompted.
